properties.description:
Data Flow to pull data from ADLS RAW to Synapse database
Data Transformation used to update PROJECTNO and create SPOOLNUMBER

typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		PROJNAME as string,
		PROJNO as string,
		DOC_ID as string,
		{DOCUMENT NUMBER} as string,
		REVISION as string,
		{REVISION DATE} as string,
		TITLE as string,
		{ISSUE STATE} as string,
		{TRANSMITTAL NUMBER} as string,
		{TRANSMITTAL DATE} as string,
		DELIVERABLE as string,
		{IDOCS FOLDER} as string,
		{REF DOC} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> srcSpoolStatusReportRAWLatest
srcSpoolStatusReportRAWLatest derive(PROJNO = concat('99',PROJNO),
		ISONumber = (regexExtract({DOCUMENT NUMBER}, '[\\d]{3}-PI[\\d]{2}-[A-Z]{1,3}[0-9]{0,2}-[A-Z0-9]*-[\\d]{2}',0))) ~> DataTransformation
DataTransformation sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	input(
		stage_idoc_P21A_SpoolStatus_id as integer,
		PROJNAME as string,
		PROJNO as string,
		DOC_ID as string,
		DocumentNumber as string,
		Revision as string,
		RevisionDate as string,
		Title as string,
		IssueState as string,
		TransmittalNumber as string,
		TransmittalDate as string,
		Deliverable as string,
		ISONumber as string,
		iDocsFolder as string,
		RefDoc as string
	),
	deletable:false,
	insertable:true,
	updateable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	truncate:true,
	format: 'table',
	staged: true,
	allowCopyCommand: true,
	errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError',
	mapColumn(
		PROJNAME,
		PROJNO,
		DOC_ID,
		DocumentNumber = {DOCUMENT NUMBER},
		Revision = REVISION,
		RevisionDate = {REVISION DATE},
		Title = TITLE,
		IssueState = {ISSUE STATE},
		TransmittalNumber = {TRANSMITTAL NUMBER},
		TransmittalDate = {TRANSMITTAL DATE},
		Deliverable = DELIVERABLE,
		ISONumber,
		iDocsFolder = {IDOCS FOLDER},
		RefDoc = {REF DOC}
	)) ~> snkSpoolStatusRptSynapse
